title: Google's Gemini Spark is now available to more users
excerpt: Need agentic AI from Google? You'll have to pay.
content_html:
Google's Gemini Spark, the company's AI agent that completes tasks and monitors stuff in the background for you, is now more widely available. You still can't get it for free, though.

Starting today, Gemini Spark is available for users in the U.S. who are paying for the $20/month Google Ai Pro tier. Globally, you'll need to pay for Google AI Ultra, which starts at about $100 (depending on the market).

The one exception to this are folks in the European Economic Area (EEA), the UK, Switzerland, or Nigeria, which aren't (yet) getting access to Gemini Spark.

Mashable Light Speed

You May Also Like

Google's support documents say you shouldn't worry if you don't have access to Spark yet, as the company is "rapidly expanding access to more users and businesses over the coming weeks."

Gemini Spark is based on Gemini 3.5 and, like other similar agents, is designed to work in the background. Offering a daily summary of your tasks for the day, based on your calendar, documents, notes, and inbox, is one example of what it can do.

Competitors offer a similar agent, and for a similar price. OpenAI's ChatGPT Work is only available on paid tiers, as is Anthropic's Claude Cowork. Pricing for both starts at about $20 per month, though the difference is that they're available in Europe and the UK.

content_html_zh:
谷歌的 Gemini Spark 是该公司的人工智能代理，可以在后台为您完成任务和监控内容，现在已经得到了更广泛的应用。 不过，您仍然无法免费获得它。

从今天开始，Gemini Spark 可供每月支付 20 美元 Google Ai Pro 套餐的美国用户使用。 在全球范围内，您需要支付 Google AI Ultra 的费用，起价约为 100 美元（取决于市场）。

唯一的例外是欧洲经济区 (EEA)、英国、瑞士或尼日利亚的人们，他们（尚未）能够访问 Gemini Spark。

可混搭光速

你可能也喜欢

谷歌的支持文件称，如果您还无法访问 Spark，您不必担心，因为该公司“将在未来几周内迅速扩大对更多用户和企业的访问权限”。

Gemini Spark 基于 Gemini 3.5，与其他类似代理一样，设计为在后台运行。 它的功能之一就是根据您的日历、文档、笔记和收件箱提供当天任务的每日摘要。

竞争对手以相似的价格提供类似的代理。 OpenAI 的 ChatGPT Work 仅在付费级别提供，Anthropic 的 Claude Cowork 也是如此。 两者的起价约为每月 20 美元，但区别在于它们在欧洲和英国有售。
